header: The people behind every Desiderio release
subheadline: A small, senior team at webconsulting studio — design, engineering, and accessibility under one roof. The same people answer your Pro support tickets and run the managed hosting.

members.name: Lea Fischer
members.bio: Owns the 49-component library and the token scale that keeps all 15 presets consistent — including the custom presets we design for client brands.

members.name: Mara Weiss
members.bio: Built the atoms and molecules behind all 244 content elements, and runs the LTS upgrades for managed-hosting customers.

members.name: Noah Ritter
members.bio: Reviews every element for WCAG-minded markup — the contrast checks behind all 15 presets are his, and they survive every theme switch.
